full_text:
Cell Cycle project


Alva’s MSc thesis progress
13.2

Agenda

Summary of previous results
Spatial analysis with spatial count and LDA
Differences between spatial count and LDA

Cell phenotyping has been performed and visually validated for distinct phenotypes

Parameters and calculations of LDA and spatial count

Spatial count 
spatial count: radius 40px (median of 4 neighboring cells)
tried 30px (median 2 cells)
K Means clustering, k=10

LDA
radius: 40px (13 microns)
number of latent motifs, 10
clustering with K Means, k=10

Spatial count

LDA

RCNs were named after composition and visual confirmation

Endothelial RCN

Spatial count

LDA

The cell counts in corresponding RCNs show small variations, with greater phenotypic variability in spatial count-based RCNs and more homogeneity in LDA-derived RCNs

UMAPs show similar clustering in both methods, with LDA being more homogeneous and spatial count more heterogeneous

Diversity indices and relative phenotype abundance show a greater diversity in spatial count RCNs

RCN diversity has also been visually checked

Tumor, no infiltration

B cell dominated

CD20 CD11c CD4 
Vimentin CD163 CD31

PanCK CD11c CD8 
Vimentin CD163 Iba1

1: Tumor, no infiltration
2: Tumor-stromal interface
3: Stroma, not infiltrated
4: Stroma, immune infiltr.
5: Endothelial
6: B cell dominated

7: CD8+ T cells
8: DC
9: CD163+ DC
10: CD163- Macrophages
11: CD4+ T cells

Most cells share the same RCN across methods

Spatial count

LDA

B-cell dominated

LDA and spatial count show similar patterns across patient groups

n=13

B-cell dominated

K Means LDA

Comparison of methods across clinical groups

Titles and reviewers

Analyzing Spatial Architecture in Highly Multiplexed Images of a Cohort of HR-Proficient HGSC
Exploring Spatial Architecture and Phenotypic Profiling in Highly Multiplexed Images of HR-Proficient HGSC

Speaker notes:
Analyzing the spatial architecture in highly multiplexed images in a cohort of HR-proficient HGSC

B-cell dominated cluster

Spatial count LDA

Both methods are showing similar trends when comparing clinical groups in RCNs

n=13

Boxplot spatial counts

Boxplot LDA

Long PFS (n=7)
